parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (source, external_id, niche, status, metadata)
VALUES ('vk', $1, $2, 'new', $3::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (source, external_id) DO UPDATE
  SET metadata = leads.metadata || EXCLUDED.metadata,
      updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, status;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.external_id, $json.niche, JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, url: $json.url, members: $json.members, city: $json.city, description: $json.description, site: $json.site, activity: $json.activity })] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO metrics (workflow, metric, value, tags) VALUES ('21-vk-lead-parser','leads_processed',1,$1::jsonb);
